proof_boundary: This contract defines scoped customs/trade review evidence for preparation-language review only. It does not confirm tariff treatment, approve CFIA/admissibility, act as a customs broker, approve shipment, or approve public launch.

required_evidence_categories.label: Review scope, product, and lane
required_evidence_categories.why: The reviewer must know the product, origin, destination, direction, intended use, and exact packet scope.

required_evidence_categories.label: Reviewer identity, qualification, and scope
required_evidence_categories.why: Customs/trade review needs a named qualified reviewer and a scope limitation tied to the reviewed packet.

required_evidence_categories.label: CBSA importer obligations review
required_evidence_categories.why: Business/RM account, importer responsibility, accounting, and other government requirement routing must be reviewed for the lane.

required_evidence_categories.label: Broker boundary and importer responsibility
required_evidence_categories.why: The product must not act as a customs broker and must preserve importer responsibility language.

required_evidence_categories.label: HS candidate and classification boundary
required_evidence_categories.why: HS candidates can support research only; classification and tariff treatment need qualified review or authoritative evidence.

required_evidence_categories.label: Customs tariff/treatment review
required_evidence_categories.why: Tariff source routes, duty treatment, and tariff wording must be checked before any stronger statement is allowed.

required_evidence_categories.label: Origin, preference, and origin-document review
required_evidence_categories.why: Origin or preferential treatment language needs origin evidence and reviewer scope, not just origin country text.

required_evidence_categories.label: Regulated goods and CFIA/AIRS review
required_evidence_categories.why: Food, seafood, plant, animal, and other regulated-product routes need dated CFIA/AIRS or reviewer evidence.

required_evidence_categories.label: Sanctions and import/export controls review
required_evidence_categories.why: Restricted countries, parties, controls, and prohibited-goods issues need dated source checks and reviewer notes.

required_evidence_categories.label: Required documents and accounting review
required_evidence_categories.why: Commercial invoice, packing list, origin, permits/certificates, accounting, and record requirements need a scoped evidence list.

required_evidence_categories.label: Incoterms, importer of record, and responsibility path
required_evidence_categories.why: Responsibility for import, export, customs, freight, documents, and broker review must be explicit.

required_evidence_categories.label: Allowed and blocked claim language
required_evidence_categories.why: The reviewer must state which preparation language is allowed and which approval-style claims remain blocked.

required_evidence_categories.label: Unresolved findings and next actions
required_evidence_categories.why: Open customs/trade findings need severity, owner, next action, and review-before-use status.

required_evidence_categories.label: Reviewer signed scope decision
required_evidence_categories.why: A dated decision is required before the finding can count as returned qualified review evidence.

source_anchors.name: Importing commercial goods into Canada
source_anchors.product_use: Importer workflow, business/import account, tariff, origin, rulings, accounting, and other government requirement routing.

source_anchors.name: Licensed customs brokers
source_anchors.product_use: Broker boundary, importer responsibility, and licensed-broker review lane anchor.

source_anchors.name: Canadian Customs Tariff 2026
source_anchors.product_use: Tariff source routing and HS/tariff candidate review anchor.

source_anchors.name: Automated Import Reference System
source_anchors.product_use: CFIA-regulated food, plant, animal, and commodity requirement routing anchor.

source_anchors.name: Canadian sanctions
source_anchors.product_use: Sanctions, restricted-country, and restricted-party warning route anchor.

source_anchors.name: Export and import controls
source_anchors.product_use: Import/export controls and permits route anchor.

source_anchors.name: Harmonized System
source_anchors.product_use: HS six-digit candidate and classification-boundary anchor.

source_anchors.name: Incoterms 2020
source_anchors.product_use: Responsibility, costs, risk, and seller/buyer task split anchor.

source_anchors.name: Importer Exporter Code
source_anchors.product_use: India origin/exporter identity and export-readiness routing anchor.
